summary: REQ-22 appears implemented by adding a decorative, animated mascot to MathematicsPage with pointer-events disabled, aria-hidden/empty alt, reduced-motion disabling, and responsive visibility. REQ-23 is not fully satisfied because the required new image asset file is not shown as added in the diff summary.

missing_requirements.requirement: Add the new mascot image as a local static asset under frontend/public/assets/generated with the exact filename mascot-rocketfox.dim_768x768.png and reference it via /assets/generated/... without breaking existing assets.
missing_requirements.reason: The Mathematics page references the new asset path, but the diff shows no added files, so there is no evidence that frontend/public/assets/generated/mascot-rocketfox.dim_768x768.png was actually added.
